Common.footer_description: Professional medical transport and private ambulance services. Your safety and comfort are our priority.

Home.hero_desc: Professional private ambulance and medical transport services. Qualified medical staff, modern equipped vehicles, and immediate response — when it matters most.
Home.why_desc: We combine medical expertise with reliable transport to deliver a service you can trust in your most critical moments.
Home.f1_desc: Round-the-clock service, every day of the year. Emergency or planned — we are always ready to respond swiftly.
Home.f2_desc: All vehicles are fully equipped with life-support systems, defibrillators, oxygen, and monitoring devices.
Home.f3_desc: Our staff includes certified paramedics and nurses who ensure patient safety and comfort throughout transport.
Home.f4_desc: We handle cross-border medical transport with full coordination for international patient transfers.
Home.f5_desc: From call to destination, we prioritize patient dignity, comfort, and medical needs at every step.
Home.f6_desc: Fully licensed, certified, and insured. Operating in full compliance with all medical transport regulations.
Home.serv_desc: From routine hospital transfers to emergency repatriation — we cover all medical transport needs.
Home.s1_desc: Safe, medically supervised transfers between hospitals and clinics.
Home.s2_desc: On-site medical standby for sports events, concerts, and public gatherings.
Home.s3_desc: Cross-border patient repatriation and international medical transfers.
Home.s4_desc: Wheelchair and stretcher-accessible transport for patients with special needs.
Home.t1_content: Extremely fast response and professional attitude. We used their services for an international transfer from Austria, everything was perfectly organized.
Home.t2_content: Thank you from the bottom of my heart! Fast, reliable, and incredibly careful with the patient. I highly recommend Medtrans Pleven.
Home.t3_content: Flawless service. The ambulance arrived fully equipped and the staff was extremely reassuring during a very stressful time.
Home.cta_desc: Our dispatch team is standing by — call immediately.

Services.hero_desc: Comprehensive medical transport solutions for patients, families, and healthcare providers — available around the clock.
Services.s1_desc: We provide reliable and medically supervised transfers between hospitals, clinics, rehabilitation centers, and other healthcare facilities. Our vehicles are equipped to handle patients requiring continuous monitoring.
Services.s2_desc: Providing medical standby and first-response teams for sports events, concerts, corporate gatherings, and mass public events. We ensure rapid medical response is available at all times during your event.
Services.s2_f6: Scalable team size for any event
Services.s3_desc: We handle complex international medical transport including patient repatriation from abroad, cross-border hospital transfers, and coordination with foreign medical institutions and insurance providers.
Services.s3_f1: Medical repatriation from any European country
Services.s3_f3: Medical escort during air and road travel
Services.s3_f6: Transition between medically equipped aircraft and ambulances
Services.s4_desc: Specialized transport for patients with mobility limitations, wheelchair users, and patients requiring stretcher transport. We provide dignified, comfortable, and safe journeys for every patient.
Services.cta_title: Need a Service Not Listed Here?
Services.cta_desc: Our team handles custom requests. Call us to discuss your specific medical transport requirements.

Fleet.hero_desc: Modern, regularly serviced vehicles with state-of-the-art medical equipment. Every vehicle is inspected and restocked after each transport.
Fleet.cat_desc: We match the right vehicle to your specific medical transport need.
Fleet.v1_desc: High-performance emergency ambulance with full ALS (Advanced Life Support) capability. Rapid response vehicle for critical patient transport.
Fleet.v2_desc: Specialized vehicle for critically ill patients requiring ICU-level care during transport. Equipped with hospital-grade monitoring and life support.
Fleet.eq_desc: Every vehicle is stocked and inspected to meet the highest medical transport standards.
Fleet.e1_desc: AED and manual defibrillators in every emergency unit
Fleet.e2_desc: Medical-grade oxygen with flow regulators and masks
Fleet.e4_desc: Mechanical CPR devices and manual resuscitation bags
Fleet.e5_desc: Full emergency pharmacological kits for all scenarios
Fleet.e6_desc: Direct radio connection to dispatch and receiving facilities
Fleet.banner_desc: Our fleet undergoes regular technical and medical inspections to ensure every transport meets the highest safety standards.

Contact.hero_desc: Need immediate help? Call us. Planning ahead? Use the booking form below.
Contact.safety_banner: For life-threatening emergencies, call national emergency services (112) first, then contact us.
Contact.info_desc: Reach us through any of the channels below. Our dispatch team is always available.
Contact.c1_desc: Available 24/7. For urgent medical transport, call immediately.
Contact.c2_desc: For non-urgent enquiries and coordination with healthcare providers.
Contact.c3_desc: Serving northern Bulgaria, Sofia, and all national/international routes.
Contact.c4_desc: Round-the-clock service — 365 days a year, including holidays.
Contact.direct_call_desc: Don't fill out the form — just call us directly.
Contact.form_desc: Fields marked with * are required. We will confirm your booking by phone within 2 hours.
Contact.f_notes_p: Medical condition, special requirements, doctor's name...
Contact.form_disclaimer: For immediate emergencies, please call us directly instead of using this form.
Contact.success_desc: Thank you for your booking request. Our team will contact you shortly to confirm the details.

PriceEstimator.search_label: Search for a city, town or village...
PriceEstimator.disclaimer: *This is a simulated estimate. Final price depends on specific medical needs and exact distance.
